name: Goal Getter
description: A simple, powerful goal-setting app that helps you turn ideas into action. Break big goals into clear steps, track progress over time, and stay motivated.

name: Care About You
description: A kindness generator that makes staying connected effortless. Get simple, thoughtful ideas to check in, show appreciation, and brighten someone's day.

name: Advocate's Compass
description: A supportive planning application that helps individuals find their voice and navigate everyday advocacy. It guides users through personalized plans, clear goals, and real-life scenarios.

name: Beat the Craving
description: This app helps individuals overcome cravings by tracking their progress and providing coping strategies. Users can customize a list of options like praying or calling a friend.
